plugins.name: checkmate
plugins.description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice. Anchors every run in the team's Spare General Google Drive folder for sourced per-row answers. Every comment must address the row's specific requirement (no copy-paste across rows; review skill flags repetition automatically). Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs. Fill handoff requires a clean review pass. Built for the Spare SE team to replace Responsive.
